title: anthurium × burfordiense
intro: Anthurium × burfordiense, also known as the Burfordii Antherium or Queen Anthurium, is a hybrid plant species within the Arum family, characterized by its attractive and long-lasting heart-shaped flowers in shades of red and white. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments.
